prediction_outcome: confirmed (4/4): r(Δattn, V|nums) > 0 for H5 ✓✓, paired test positive ✓✓, answer ≠ dispensable ✓, V|nums > nums_R ✓✓
key_finding: Model attends to V|nums-rich positions BEYOND recency at ALL 32 head×layer conditions (partial r positive, all p<0.001, n=174). Answer step > control at all 32 conditions. V|nums r=0.45 >> nums_R r=0.18 (hidden info 2.5x > text). H5 partial_r increases L9→L35 (0.26→0.34). BRIDGES probing + attention evidence → complete encode→store→retrieve circuit.
evidence_impact: Upgrades Phase 2 from 'info exists + model attends differently' to 'model actively RETRIEVES hidden info'. Strongest single Phase 2 finding. Directly addresses exp_095's confound (recency vs hidden channel).
next_planned: Cross-model replication on Phi-3.5-mini, or quadratic position control robustness check

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: FINAL: K>V perturbation universal. K>V probing ENCODING-DEPENDENT. NOT driven by GQA.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL + ATTENTION: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive). H0 unique retrieval pattern (Exp 095).

natural_usage.status: STRONG → UPGRADED: Probing (2 families + 2 sizes). Attention routing (Exp 095). PROBE-ATTENTION CORRELATION (Exp 096): encode→store→retrieve circuit. Paraphrase NULL. WRRA on 2 families.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPREHENSIVE: Phase 1 (4 families). Phase 2 probing (2 families + 2 sizes). K/V sweeps (3 models). Attention + probe-attn corr on Qwen only — needs cross-model.

encoding_strategy.status: COMPLETE TAXONOMY: digital→K>V probing, analog→V≥K probing.

attention_mechanism.status: STRONG (Exps 095+096): Answer-step attention is information-directed. ALL heads retrieve from V|nums-rich positions. H5 strongest at deep layers. H0 unique pattern. Complete retrieval circuit.
